description: Member-facing home that personalises discovery from profile, shortlist/saved items, and Transition Agents. Distinct from the Buildings energy dashboard (ops) and Agents admin (staff). Scrollable lanes inspired by deals ticker + music finder; agent portraits attribute suggestions.
principles: Customer hub — not a second ops energy dashboard
Reuse feeds (shortlist, deals-feed, news samples, agent roster) before new APIs
Trust labels when energy glance is illustrative
Agent faces attribute who suggested what
Empty states when profile/shortlist empty — never fake personalisation

userStories.title: Customer Hub scrollable shell
userStories.description: As a member, I want a single scrollable home with clear sections so I can see saved items, suggestions, deals, and news without opening seven tools.
acceptanceCriteria: HTML at HTMLS GWM GWB/greenways-customer-hub.html
Route GET /greenways/customer-hub
Sections: header/profile, team strip, Saved, Suggested for you, Deals lane, News rail, optional Site glance
Wix no-scroll meta; works desktop and mobile (news rail stacks below on narrow)
Demo mode works without login using localStorage profile + shortlist

userStories.title: Agent-attributed suggestion cards
userStories.description: As a visitor, I want product/suggestion cards to show which specialist recommended them.
acceptanceCriteria: Cards can show agent portrait badge (from greenways-agent-roster.json)
Click opens agent chat with optional ?q= or marketplace product page
At least Artemis (equipment) and Zara (deals) lanes in v1

userStories.title: Saved + shortlist surface
userStories.description: As a member, I want my shortlisted products and saved items on the hub.
acceptanceCriteria: Reads greenways-product-shortlist from sessionStorage
When member auth present, also try GET /api/members/saved-items
Empty state with CTA to browse marketplace or ask Artemis/Zyanne

userStories.title: Profile-aware header
userStories.description: As a member, I want the hub to reflect my region and sector.
acceptanceCriteria: Reads greenways_member_context_v1 and/or gw-team-profile-v1
Shows region/sector chip; filters deals lane by region when tags allow
Link to Orchestra hub and membership dashboard

userStories.title: Cheryce news rail
userStories.description: As a visitor, I want a news strip attributed to Cheryce.
acceptanceCriteria: Loads /api/media-agent/samples or /api/media-agent/news with graceful fallback
Cheryce portrait on section header
Open media-agent with ?q= for follow-up

userStories.title: Site energy glance (trust-safe)
userStories.description: As a member with a site, I want a small energy snapshot without mistaking demo KPIs for live meters.
acceptanceCriteria: Optional strip linking to buildings dashboard or restaurant-energy-snapshot
Trust label Demo model or Catalogue when not live
Does not clone full sensor/KPI dashboard
